name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: Starter tool for coal and copper. Too weak for the richer deep ores.

name: Copper Pickaxe
description: Faster than wood and able to bite into the first metal veins.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: Reliable mid-tier pick for iron, silver, gold, and emerald seams.

name: Steel Pickaxe
description: Heavy-duty upgrade for the deep layers, including sapphire and diamond.

name: Diamond Pickaxe
description: Top-tier placeholder pick with the fastest break speed for every ore.
